description_long: This is an open hardcover book with a simple, minimalistic design. The left page is a light beige color, while the right page is solid black, creating a striking visual contrast. The book's cover appears to be a muted brown, visible along the edges and the spine. The pages are slightly curved, suggesting a realistic paper texture and thickness. There are no visible illustrations, text, or decorative elements on the cover or pages. The book is presented in a way that highlights its open, readable state, making it suitable for placement in urban environments such as parks, benches, or study areas.
description: An open hardcover book with contrasting beige and black pages, featuring a plain brown cover and no visible illustrations or text.
description_view_0: The book is open with the left page beige and the right page black, showing the inner pages and part of the brown cover.
description_view_1: A front-on view of the open book, emphasizing the black right page and the thickness of the pages.
description_view_2: The book is open with the left page black and the right page beige, mirroring view 0 but with the color positions swapped.
description_view_3: A rear view of the open book, highlighting the beige left page and the thickness of the book's pages.
